title: Video Editor
description:
The Role

We’re looking for a Cinematic Videographer — someone who doesn’t just shoot footage, but paints with light and motion.

You’ll be behind the camera for celebrity-driven shoots, luxury fashion campaigns, and brand films that define culture.

From ideation to post-production, you’ll play a hands-on role in transforming creative concepts into scroll-stopping visuals seen across Asia.

What You’ll Do

  • Create cinematic magic: Film high-impact visuals using Sony FX, RED, or Blackmagic systems across fashion sets, celebrity shoots, and global brand campaigns.
  • Shape stories: Collaborate with our award-winning creative team on storyboards, camera movement, lighting, and narrative tone.
  • Bring emotion through light: Design lighting setups that elevate mood, texture, and brand identity.
  • Perfect every frame: Edit, color-grade, and refine your work to the level of international luxury standards.
  • Collaborate with the best: Work closely with directors, producers, stylists, and artists to ensure every campaign looks like it belongs in a film festival reel.
  • Guard the gear: Maintain our in-house arsenal of professional camera, lighting, and sound equipment.

Who You Are

  • You have 3+ years in video production or cinematography, with a strong showreel that shows your creative range.
  • You live and breathe cinematic storytelling, composition, and rhythm.
  • You’re proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, and ideally DaVinci Resolve.
  • You’re adaptable, resourceful, and thrive in dynamic environments — from sleek studios to outdoor run-and-gun shoots.

You have an eye for fashion, detail, and emotional storytelling that moves audiences.

*Bonus if you’ve worked in beauty, fashion, or luxury, or have experience in 3D or motion graphics.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

  • Shoot for Icons: Capture campaigns featuring top celebrities, KOLs, and luxury brands like Dior Beauty, Macallan, Raffles City, and Marina Bay Sands.
  • Create Cultural Moments: Be part of films and campaigns that trend, inspire, and win awards.
  • Grow With a Visionary Team: Collaborate with creative directors, stylists, and filmmakers who are redefining Asia’s visual landscape.
  • Be Seen, Not Hidden: Your work will be showcased across high-traffic screens, social media, and international media placements.
  • Push the Craft Forward: Experiment with cinematic lighting, new tech, and AI-powered storytelling tools.
